title: geoextent
description: Python library for extracting geospatial extent of files and directories with multiple data formats. This project is developed as part of the DFG-funded research project Opening Reproducible Research (o2r, https://o2r.info).
notes: This work has been supported in part by the German Research Foundation (DFG) through the project NFDI4Earth (DFG project no. 460036893, https://nfdi4earth.de/), in part by the DFG through the project Opening Reproducible Research (o2r, DFG project no. PE 1632/10-1 and PE 1632/17-1, https://o2r.info), and in part by the German Federal Ministry of Research, Technology and Space (BMFTR) through the project KOMET — Kompetenzzentrum Metadatenstandards für die Wissenschaft (BMFTR grant no. 16KOA009B, https://projects.tib.eu/komet/en/projekt/).

grants.title: NFDI4Earth — National Research Data Infrastructure for Earth System Sciences
KOMET — Kompetenzzentrum Metadatenstandards für die Wissenschaft

funder.name: Bundesministerium für Forschung, Technologie und Raumfahrt
